title: Return structured exact-path denials from nonconflict assessment
goal: Restore the stable navigation contract of T046 by making grabowski_resource_nonconflict_assess return the intentional machine-readable exact-path denial instead of crashing its public wrapper while trying to read a nonexistent proof.

approval.note: Fix response shaping only; do not weaken exact path overlap, issue a proof for path blockers or grant release authority.

acceptance.assertion: For a live exact path blocker, the public MCP tool returns decision=deny, code=exact-path-owner-release-required, blocker_type=exact_path_lease, the bounded lease snapshot and the owner-bound reconciliation next action.
The response contains no non-conflict proof and grants no acquisition, retry, write, release or reclaim authority.
Repository blockers retain their proof-capable assessment path; unsupported blockers and absent or expired path blockers retain their distinct stable codes.
The public wrapper never assumes result[proof] exists unless decision=allow and validates response shaping for every assessor result variant.
Tests invoke the actual public tool for live path deny, absent path, unsupported blocker, repository allow and repository deny paths and assert no KeyError or generic transport failure.
After deployment, a real exact-path assessment returns the structured denial while the foreign lease remains unchanged and a normal acquisition still fails closed.

live_reproduction.inputs: one informal and one fully canonical scope request against the active src/grabowski_mcp.py exact path lease
live_reproduction.underlying_contract: assess_nonconflict intentionally returns a structured exact-path deny without a proof; the MCP wrapper unconditionally dereferences result[proof].

current_blocker.reason: These exact implementation paths contain uncommitted foreign T057 hardening. Do not patch, reset, stage or extract them until that owner closes or publishes its work.

does_not_establish: permission to release the active workspace lifecycle lease
permission to treat path scopes as non-conflicting
permission to modify the dirty T057 worktree
that T046 reconciliation semantics are otherwise invalid
